case_title: TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC. VS. ALONZO CROSBY

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT CROSBY, ALONZO

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CROSBY, ALONZO THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 520 SOUTH VAN NESS AVE., ROOM #229, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94110 SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT CROSBY, ALONZO
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CROSBY, ALONZO
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CROSBY, ALONZO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT CROSBY, ALONZO
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC. SERVED MAY-24-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CROSBY, ALONZO
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE **$16.43** FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC.
